name: get_library_info
description: Get an overview of the user library — projects and optionally resources in a specific folder.

folder_id.description: Optional project/folder ID to scope the resource list.

name: list_recent_resources
description: List the most recently updated resources in Dome (notes, PDFs, media, etc.).

name: search_resources
description: Full-text search across the Dome library by keyword.

name: open_resource
description: Open a resource in the main Dome window as a tab.

name: navigate_dome_ui
description: Switch the main Dome window to a built-in section (tab).

view.description: One of: home, settings, calendar, agents, studio, flashcards, learn, tags, marketplace.

name: create_note
description: Create a new note in the library. Use when the user asks to save or write something down.

title.description: Short title (optional; derived from content if omitted).

content.description: Full text body of the note.

name: close_session
description: End the voice session after the user says goodbye or similar.
